name: Expansion
description: The legacy DayZ Expansion mod featuring Reimagined Chernarus, Grave Crosses, Kill/Death Feed, Autowalk, Player List, and Street Lights.
overview:
DayZ-Expansion is the main client/server mod that adds visual overhauls, quality-of-life features, and new gameplay mechanics to DayZ.

## Key Features

- **Reimagined Chernarus** — Nature has taken over: many locations have been partially or completely reworked with an overgrown apocalyptic feel. Houses feature new interiors, exteriors, and lighting.
- **Street Lights** — Repair a large generator to make your favorite city glow again at night.
- **Grave Cross** — Dead bodies can be replaced with a grave cross that also contains the body's items.
- **Kill/Death Feed** — Announces and displays player deaths for all conditions to all active players.
- **Autowalk / Autosprint** — Keybindings to enable autowalk and autosprint for long-distance travel.
- **In-Game Player List** — A keybinding to display a player list with all active players and their character statistics.
installation: Subscribe to DayZ-Expansion on the Steam Workshop (ID 2116151222).
Place the @DayZ-Expansion folder in your server's root directory.
Add @DayZ-Expansion to your server's -mod= launch parameter AFTER @ExpansionCore.
Start the server — configuration files will be generated in your server profile directory.
Restart after reviewing and adjusting the generated config files.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure the mod is loaded on both client and server. Map changes require the client to have the mod subscribed and loaded.
Players need to find and repair a large generator near the city. Check that the street light feature is enabled in the server config.
Verify the kill feed is enabled in the Expansion notification settings. Check RPT logs for errors.

useCases.title: Immersive Chernarus Overhaul
useCases.description: Use Reimagined Chernarus to give your server a unique, overgrown post-apocalyptic atmosphere with reworked locations and lighting.

useCases.title: PvP Kill Feed
useCases.description: Enable the Kill/Death Feed to display player kills server-wide, adding a competitive element to your server.

useCases.title: Night-Time City Gameplay
useCases.description: Combine Street Lights with generator repair mechanics to create lit urban areas at night.

useCases.title: Quality of Life
useCases.description: Autowalk and the in-game player list reduce friction for players traveling long distances or looking for teammates.

steps: Subscribe to DayZ-Expansion on the Steam Workshop (ID 2116151222).
Place the @DayZ-Expansion folder in your server's root directory.

useCases.title: Reimagined Chernarus changes not visible

useCases.title: Street lights not working
